tvl_context._note: Indexer fetches at runtime. Aave protocol-wide TVL spans many markets; this record covers Ethereum Main Market only.

admin_surface.scope: Root admin in ACL Manager. Can grant/revoke any other role including POOL_ADMIN. Held by ACLAdmin set in PoolAddressesProvider, which on Ethereum Main is the Governance V3 Executor Lvl1.

timelock._note: Executor Lvl1 has 1-day delay between proposal queuing and execution. Owned by Aave Governance V3 Core contract on Ethereum.

admin_surface.scope: Can update token implementations, drop reserves, (un)pause and (de)activate reserves, update premiums, list assets, modify risk parameters. Most powerful protocol-modifying role short of upgrading core implementation.
admin_surface._note: Per Aave docs: 'All deployers have resigned their POOL_ADMIN roles. All instances of the POOL_ADMIN role, across all v3 networks, are now governed by the Guardians multisig or by the Governance Bridge executors.' On Ethereum, the Governance Bridge executor is Executor Lvl1.

admin_surface.scope: Can pause and unpause the entire pool or individual reserves. Cannot drain, change parameters, or upgrade. Pause-only emergency switch.

multisig._note: Aave Protocol Emergency Guardian. 5-of-9 multisig of community-elected signers. Address requires runtime verification by indexer; current signer list is published in Aave governance forum and ARFC addenda but rotates. Indexer should fetch via Safe.getOwners() at index time.

admin_surface.scope: Can update reserve parameters and risk settings (caps, premiums, e-mode categories). Cannot pause, drop reserves, or upgrade.

controller._note: RISK_ADMIN role is granted to multiple addresses including the CapsPlusRiskSteward (1/1 multisig with strict on-chain validation rails) and FreezeSteward. Indexer must enumerate all role holders via ACLManager.getRoleMember() iteration.

admin_surface.scope: Can list new assets, update oracle sources for individual reserves. Subset of POOL_ADMIN powers.

controller._note: Currently held by Executor Lvl1 and Risk Steward addresses. Enumerate at index time.

admin_surface.scope: Whitelisted addresses for bridge mintUnbacked() and backUnbacked() operations. Used by canonical bridges (e.g. Polygon/Arbitrum native bridges) for unbacked asset accounting.

controller._note: Limited blast radius - cannot drain, only mint/back unbacked. Still a non-trivial admin surface.

admin_surface.scope: Whitelisted addresses pay 0 fee on flash loans. Cannot drain or modify protocol.

controller._note: Low-risk role. Mention for completeness; not a security factor.

admin_surface.scope: Owner of the Aave Governance V3 Core contract itself. Controls voting parameters, registered voting portals, and can replace Executor implementations.

timelock._note: Executor Lvl2 (Long Executor) has 7-day delay. Required for highest-impact changes including governance parameter modifications and AAVE token logic upgrades. Address requires verification by indexer - placeholder used here.

admin_surface.scope: Can veto/cancel any onchain payload deemed malicious before execution. Cannot create proposals or modify the protocol directly.

multisig._note: Aave Governance Emergency Guardian. 5-of-9 multisig. Address requires runtime verification - placeholder used. Distinct from Protocol Emergency Guardian above.

upgrade_paths._note: Pool contract is upgradeable via PoolAddressesProvider.setPoolImpl(). PoolAddressesProvider is owned by Executor Lvl1 (1-day delay). Effective upgrade path: DAO proposal → 1-day Executor Lvl1 delay → upgrade. Implementation address fetched at index time.
PoolConfigurator. Same upgrade authority as Pool.

emergency_controls.scope: Pauses all reserves protocol-wide. Borrows, supplies, withdrawals, repayments, liquidations all halt.
emergency_controls._note: Pause does not steal funds — users can still withdraw once unpaused. But it is an immediate, non-timelocked freeze of protocol activity.

emergency_controls.scope: Pauses individual reserve. Same effects as pausePool, scoped to one asset.
Stops new supplies/borrows on a reserve. Existing positions can still be repaid and liquidated.
emergency_controls._note: Less severe than pause. FreezeSteward (1/1 multisig) holds this granted via RISK_ADMIN role.

timelocks._note: Executor Lvl1 (Short Executor v3). 1-day delay. Standard execution path for most protocol changes.
Executor Lvl2 (Long Executor v3). 7-day delay. Reserved for highest-impact changes. Address placeholder - verify at index time.

oracles._note: AaveOracle wraps Chainlink price feeds per asset. Per-asset feed addresses set via setAssetSources(), gated by ASSET_LISTING_ADMIN or POOL_ADMIN. Indexer must enumerate per-asset feeds at index time. No protocol-wide staleness threshold; each Chainlink feed has its own heartbeat.
